publish.description: In-game party stat tracker for Pokémon Essentials fan games (RPG Maker XP / MV / MZ) on Steam Deck. Live HP/IV/EV display, type chart, save-file parser, and a draggable touch menu. Reads the game's own PBS files for accurate move types including custom fan-game moves. Adapts its UI to what the save actually contains — no empty placeholders.
